trustedSourceSummary: No official consumer documents were found in the last 60 days, so the latest available official sources from 2025-2026 were used. Organizations used: Altroconsumo. Altroconsumo’s November 2025 laboratory tests recommend Riso Carnaroli and Riso Basmati as top choices for their cooking performance and quality.
